title: NASA’s Psyche Mission Images Mars’ Huygens Crater
description: Captured by the multispectral imager instrument on NASA’s Psyche mission, this is an enhanced-color view of the large double-ring crater Huygens (upper right; about 290 miles, or 470 kilometers, in diameter) and the surrounding heavily cratered southern highlands near 15 degrees south latitude. The post NASA’s Psyche Mission Images Mars’ Huygens Crater appeared first on NASA Science.
